method: generated by direct repository interrogation on 2026-07-13, not copied from any prior tracker or external estimate: git state read with git commands (branches, tags, remote refs); the full test suite executed (262 test binaries, 1050 tests passed, 0 failed, 17 ignored env-gated live proofs); counts taken from test-regenerated reports (runtime-preview-capability-matrix, runtime-preview-dead-man-classification, runtime-preview-input-cursor-live-proof-status) and from source receipt constants (PROVEN_RECORD_SHAPE_PROOFS, PROVEN_INPUT_ROWS, PROVEN_FAMILY_RECORD_PROOFS, SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS); release state verified with sha256sum over dist trees and gh release view; manual-test state from data/reports/manual-rc-test-v0.2.0-rc.1.v0.55.2.json; prior progress estimates were deliberately not consulted for any number

releaseState.evidence: GitHub release v0.2.0 published (not draft, not prerelease) with 3 assets, verified via gh release view; dist/v0.2.0 SHA256SUMS match; dist/v0.1.0 and dist/v0.2.0-rc.1 checksum-verified untouched

validationState.evidence: cargo fmt --check clean; cargo test 262 binaries / 1050 tests passed / 0 failed / 17 ignored (env-gated live proofs); jq empty over all report JSON; git diff --check clean; cargo build --release clean; appstreamcli validate and desktop-file-validate pass

manualTestState.status: passed for the driven surface; two config-writing clicks remain human-only
manualTestState.evidence: 10/10 driven steps passed against the packaged RC binary in the real session (data/reports/manual-rc-test-v0.2.0-rc.1.v0.55.2.json); Save previewed value / Save as default were not activated because the app's own control descriptions prohibit GTK automation from activating them; those paths are live-flow-proven at the API layer

artifactState.evidence: dist/v0.1.0 (2 tarballs + SHA256SUMS, unchanged), dist/v0.2.0-rc.1 (2 tarballs + SHA256SUMS), dist/v0.2.0 (2 tarballs + SHA256SUMS, attached to the GitHub release); all built by the guarded build-only script

scalarSettings.evidence: 341/341 scalar rows modeled and classified (capability matrix report, regenerated every cargo test); 341 safe-writable row entries in src/write_classification.rs; every UI save routes through the gated scalar Save (guard-tested)

runtimePreview.coverage: 135/341 rows live-previewable today (62 direct + 73 throttled, about 40%); 78 dead-man; 43 config-write-only; 74 blocked high-risk with reasons; 11 not proven yet
runtimePreview.evidence: runtime-preview-capability-matrix.v0.55.2.json summary block, regenerated by the suite

deadManPreview.coverage: 38/78 dead-man rows armed (about 49%); of the 63 input/cursor rows needing per-row proofs, 35 were promoted by passed live proofs; 26 remain disarmed (18 touch-family needing hardware, 3 held back by judgment pending secondary devices, 5 model-only) and input.scroll_method is blocked by a proof finding
deadManPreview.evidence: runtime-preview-dead-man-classification and runtime-preview-input-cursor-live-proof-status reports; 37 receipts in PROVEN_INPUT_ROWS; countdown auto-revert additionally verified through the packaged RC binary in the manual test

structuredFamilies.evidence: 7/7 families classified from live evidence; hl.animation and hl.curve editable for proven record shapes; hl.monitor/bind/device/permission blocked high-risk and hl.gesture blocked without a verification mechanism (reasons rendered in the UI and pinned by tests)

recordPicker.evidence: 4 shape receipts in PROVEN_RECORD_SHAPE_PROOFS (animation speed, animation enabled - both toggle directions, animation bezier restricted to existing curves, curve control points), each recorded only after a passed env-gated zero-residue live proof; combined AnimationRecordFields save gated on all three animation receipts; creation/deletion inexpressible; style not editable (no trusted valid-value evidence: data/reports/style-editing-evidence.v0.55.2.json)

safeLiveSaveMode.evidence: runtime gate required by every production Save (live-verified, fail-closed); enable/disable proven through the packaged RC binary in the manual test; user-chosen persistence through the gated scalar Save, live-flow-proven with byte-exact restore

sourceIncludeAndDuplicate.evidence: production activation decision reviews reach ApprovedButDefaultDisabled with executors unwired; GTK evidence asserts the disabled cards; no production flag is true

highRiskDisplay.evidence: 74 rows blocked high-risk in the capability matrix; display recovery design does not exist; monitor/display rows sit outside dead-man entirely

profileModeSwitching.evidence: blocked by production activation and live proof; review-only card in the UI

hyprland0554Migration.evidence: 341 = 341 rows, 0 added/removed/changed, 0 bounds drift against the trusted hyprctl -j descriptions export from the official 0.55.4 binary; repeatable read-only refresh script; pinned by tests every run

hardwareGatedProofs.evidence: 18 touch-family rows and 3 judgment-held rows require hardware that is not present; no fake or simulated proofs exist in the repo

uxReadability.evidence: GTK evidence proves the UI renders its safety states and the manual RC test proves the core interactions work, but the Config page carries many developer-facing activation-review cards and proof-status text alongside the user controls; no end-user usability pass or simplification review has been performed - this is the honest gap, distinct from functional correctness

knownStaleDocsOrHistoricalSections: the long data/reports tail is frozen history: only test-regenerated reports (capability matrix, dead-man classification, live-scenario/safe-batch/gtk-safe-env) plus the reports dated 2026-07-12/13 reflect current state
docs/PROGRESS-TRACKER.md keeps dated historical sections below the current audit (logs, not current state)
docs/FINISH-APP-SPRINT.md and RELEASE-BOUNDARY-APPROVAL-PROMPT.md are historical sprint artifacts
docs/RELEASE-DECISION.md and docs/RELEASE-CANDIDATE-v0.2.0-rc.1.md record decision/RC events now resolved by the v0.2.0 release (each carries a resolution note)
nextExactWork: hardware-gated proofs when touch/tablet and secondary input devices are available (18 + 3 rows)
a UX simplification/readability pass separating end-user controls from developer/proof surfaces (the one unproven quality area)
style editing only if trusted valid-value evidence appears, followed by a live proof
track future Hyprland releases with tools/refresh_hyprland_descriptions_export.sh (a non-0.55.4 live version gets its own capture)
